team_name: ProcureShield AI - Explainable Tender Eligibility Evaluation Platform for Government Procurement
summary: Design a technical platform that, given a tender document and a set of bidder submissions, can understand the tender, understand each bidder, evaluate eligibility, and produce explainable evaluation reports for government procurement officers.
optimization_claims: No bidder is silently disqualified; every ambiguous case is flagged for human review.
All AI decisions run on submitted documents no raw PII is sent to external services.
constraints_addressed: Evaluating bid submissions manually is slow, inconsistent, and prone to human error
Legally risky to silently disqualify ambiguous bidders
